text.en: If you have upgraded a model to have a drone, place a Drone token next to your model as a reminder. These do not count as models for any rules purposes.
Guardian Drone
Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
Gun Drone
The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:
Marker Drone
The bearer’s unit has the **MARKERLIGHT** keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.
Missile Drone
The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:
Shield Drone
Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

If your Army Faction is **T'AU EMPIRE**, at the start of your Shooting phase you can select units from your army with this ability to become Observer units.

During your Shooting phase, for each Observer unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is eligible to shoot (excluding **FORTIFICATION** and Battle-shocked units) select one enemy unit that is visible to be marked as their Spotted unit until the end of the phase. Each enemy unit can only be marked as a Spotted unit once per phase.

Units from your army with the For the Greater Good ability (excluding Observer units) are Guided units while targeting one or more Spotted units.

Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your army in a Guided unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if the Spotted unit was marked by an Observer unit that has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

Each time a **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** model from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a unit within 8", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

During the first, second and third battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by **T’AU EMPIRE** models from your army have the **[ASSAULT]** ability. During the first, second and third battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), its ranged weapons have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

Friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings units have the following ability: Harnessed Alien Instincts: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is prey‑marked:
  • While a unit is prey‑marked, that unit has +3" detection range.
    • Friendly GHOSTKEEL BATTLESUIT/STEALTH BATTLESUITS units have the following ability: Localised Stealth Projectors (Aura): When a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit within 6" of this unit has shot, those attacks do not prevent that unit from being hidden. This detachment has the AUXILIARIES tag and cannot be taken with another AUXILIARIES detachment.
text.de:
Befreundete Kroot-/Vespid-Stachelflügel-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Nützliche Xenos-Instinkte: In deiner Fernkampfphase kann diese Einheit eine für sie sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene Einheit ist als Beute markiert:
  • Solange eine Einheit als Beute markiert ist, hat jene Einheit +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
    • Befreundete Phantom-Kampfanzug-/Geist-Kampfanzug-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Zielgerichtete Tarnfeldprojektoren (Aura): Wenn eine befreundete Kroot-/Vespid-Stachelflügel-Einheit innerhalb von 6" um diese Einheit geschossen hat, verhindern jene Attacken nicht, dass jene Einheit versteckt ist. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Hilfstruppen und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Hilfstruppen gewählt werden.
text.es: Las unidades Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid amigas tienen esta habilidad: Instintos alienígenas afinados: En tu fase de disparo, esta unidad puede elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga está marcada como presa: Mientras una unidad esté marcada como presa, tiene +3" al alcance de detección. Las unidades EXOARMADURA FANTASMAL/EXOARMADURAS SIGILO amigas tienen esta habilidad: Proyectores de ocultación (Aura): Cuando una unidad Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid amiga a 6" o menos de esta unidad haya disparado, esos ataques no le impiden estar oculta. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta AUXILIARES y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento AUXILIARES.
text.fr:
Les unités de Kroots/Frelons Vespides amies ont l’aptitude suivante : Instincts Étrangers Exploités : À votre phase de Tir, cette unité peut choisir une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins d’elle. L’unité ennemie choisie est marquée comme proie :
  • Tant qu’une unité est marquée comme proie, elle a +3" en portée de détection.
    • Les unités d'Exo-armure Ghostkeel/Exo-armures Stealth amies ont l’aptitude suivante :
  • Projecteurs Furtifs Localisés (Aura) : Quand une unité de Kroots/Frelons Vespides amie à 6" ou moins de cette unité a tiré, ces attaques ne l’empêchent pas d’être cachée. Ce détachement a l'étiquette Auxiliaires et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement d'Auxiliaires.
text.it:
Le unità di Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata amiche hanno le seguenti abilità: Istinti Alieni Controllati: nella tua fase di Tiro questa unità può scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12". Quell’unità nemica è una preda designata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è una preda designata, quell’unità ha +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
    • Le unità Esoscheletro Ghostkeel/Esoscheletri Stealth amiche hanno la seguente abilità: Proiettori di Campo Mimetico Localizzato (Aura): dopo che un’unità di Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata amica entro 6" da questa unità ha tirato, quegli attacchi non impediscono a quella unità di essere nascosta. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Ausiliari e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Ausiliari.
text.ja:
味方クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ： 異種族の本能活用：自軍側射撃フェイズ中、このユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択できる。選択された敵ユニットは獲物となる：
  • ユニットが獲物である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+3mvの修正を受ける。
    • 味方ゴーストキール・バトルスーツ/ステルス・バトルスーツ・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ： 局在ステルス・プロジェクター（オーラ）：味方クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング・ユニットがこのユニットの6mv以内にいる間に射撃を行った時、そのユニットは隠密状態を解除されない。 このデタッチメントは編入補助部隊のタグを持ち、他の編入補助部隊タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko:
아군 크룻/베스피드 독침날개 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 통제된 외계 본능: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛은 사냥 각인됩니다.
  • 유닛이 사냥 각인된 동안, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
    • 아군 고스트킬 배틀슈트/스텔스 배틀슈트 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 국소 스텔스 투영기(오라): 이 유닛의 6" 내에 있는 아군 크룻/베스피드 독침날개 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때, 그 공격에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 은폐 상태가 유지됩니다. 이 디태치먼트에 보조대 태그가 부여되며 다른 보조대 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
己方克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼单位拥有以下技能： 利用本能：在己方射击阶段中，该单位可以选择一个位于其 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被狩猎标记：
  • 在一个单位被狩猎标记时，那个单位的侦测范围增加 3"。
    • 己方鬼船战斗服/隐形战斗服单位拥有以下技能： 区域型隐匿投射器（光环）：在位于该单位 6" 的一个己方克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼单位进行了射击后，那些攻击不会令那个单位无法隐藏。 本分遣队拥有辅助军标签，并且不能与另一个拥有辅助军标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: Each time a **KROOT** model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if the target of that attack is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength.
**Kroot** models from your army have a 6+ invulnerable save against melee attacks and a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.
In your Shooting phase, when a friendly PATHFINDER TEAM/ STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit is selected to shoot, those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.
text.de: Wenn in deiner Fernkampfphase eine befreundete Späherteam-/Geist-Kampfanzug-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird, verhindern jene Fernkampfattacken nicht, dass deine Einheit versteckt ist.
text.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad EQUIPO DE RASTREADORES/EXOARMADURAS SIGILO amiga se elija para disparar, esos ataques a distancia no le impiden estar oculta.
text.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d'Équipe de Cibleurs/ Exo-armures Stealth amie est choisie pour tirer, ces attaques de tir ne l'empêchent pas d'être cachée.
text.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Team Esploratori/Esoscheletri Stealth amica viene scelta per tirare, quegli attacchi da tiro non impediscono alla tua unità di essere nascosta.
text.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時、それらの射撃攻撃は自軍のユニットの隠密状態を妨げない。
text.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 선도반/스텔스 배틀슈트 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 그 원거리 공격에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 은폐 상태가 유지됩니다.
text.zh: 己方射击阶段中，当一个己方探路者小队/隐形战斗服单位被选择进行射击时，那些远程攻击不会阻止您的单位隐藏。

text.en: Friendly Battlesuit Character units’ ranged attacks have +6" R. This detachment has the RETALIATION tag and cannot be taken with another RETALIATION detachment.
text.de: Fernkampfattacken befreundeter Kampfanzug-Charaktermodell-Einheiten haben +6" R. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Vergeltungskader und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Vergeltungskader gewählt werden.
text.es: Los ataques a distancia de las unidades Personaje Exoarmadura amigas tienen +6" Alc. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta REPRESALIA y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento REPRESALIA.
text.fr: Les attaques de tir des unités de Personnage en Exo-armure amies ont +6" en P. Ce détachement a l'étiquette Rétorsion et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Rétorsion.
text.it: Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità Personaggio in Esoscheletro amiche hanno +6" G. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore Rivalsa e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento Rivalsa.
text.ja: 味方バトルスーツ・キャラクター・ユニットの【射】は+6mvの修正を受ける。 このデタッチメントは応報部体タグを持ち、他の応報部体タグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: 아군 배틀슈트 캐릭터 유닛의 원거리 공격에 사거리 +6"를 적용합니다. 이 디태치먼트에 보복 태그가 부여되며 다른 보복 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 己方战斗服角色单位的远程攻击的 R 属性增加 6"。 本分遣队拥有反击标签，并且不能与另一个拥有反击标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

text.en: During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, ranged weapons equipped by **T’AU EMPIRE** models from your army have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. During the third, fourth and fifth battle rounds, while a unit is a Guided unit (see For the Greater Good), each time a ranged attack is made by a model in that unit that targets a Spotted unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

name.ja:
実験兵装 
実験兵装部体
name.zh:
原型系统
测试核心队

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that contains 6 or more models, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. If that attack targets an enemy unit that contains 11 or more models, it has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 2]** ability instead.

fluff.en: Commander Arro’kon’s teachings are considered pre-eminent in the art of engaging and eliminating numerically overwhelming enemy formations.

target.en: Two **T’AU EMPIRE** units from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1.

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem during the fourth or fifth battle rounds.

fluff.en: Mont’ka doctrine heavily emphasises the massed concentration of fire upon a single target at a time, obliterating each component of the enemy force in succession with a series of unrelenting barrages.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY** unit from your army that disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: The most aggressive Fire caste warriors sometimes spring from moving transports, roll with the impact of landing, and come up with weapons already blazing.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE** unit (excluding **KROOT** units) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a **T’AU EMPIRE** unit (excluding **KROOT** units) from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Mont’ka emphasises rapid evolving threat-analysis and the application of overwhelming firepower to eliminate emergent high-priority targets.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: By advancing swiftly into commanding positions, Mont’ka forces maximise the benefits of their enemies’ shock and disorientation.

target.en: One **KROOT** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: After your unit has resolved its attacks this phase, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a **KROOT** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, unless the attacking unit is Battle-shocked, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The Kroot have long perfected the art of ambush hunting, their packs working in deadly concert.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. The first time you use this Stratagem, you must also select one objective marker that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone; until the end of the battle, this becomes your Trap objective marker.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Trap objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

fluff.en: Kauyon teaches that many things can be used to bait a trap, luring the foe into position.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

restrictions.en: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

fluff.en: Devastating firepower need not be applied from afar, especially when striking an unsuspecting foe.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE** unit from your army that has just been selected as an Observer unit (see For the Greater Good).

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if your unit has the **Markerlight** keyword, that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

fluff.en: T’au Hunter Cadres work in close coordination to destroy the most dangerous enemy targets.

target.en: One **STEALTH**, **GHOSTKEEL** or **COMMANDER SHADOWSUN** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

restrictions.en: You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: T’au Stealth Cadres utilise obfuscation fields and wide-band refraction beams to mask their advance.

target.en: One **KROOT INFANTRY** or **KROOT HOUNDS** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.

restrictions.en: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed **CHARACTER** units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: When a Kroot Hunting Pack closes in on its prey, there are often other hunters waiting to join in the fray and take their share of any spoils.

target.en: That destroyed model’s unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even if that unit was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after a **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** model from your army is destroyed.

effect.en: Before removing your model from play, if it has the Deadly Demise ability, do not roll for that ability; instead, you can choose whether the result of that roll is a 1 or a 6. If your model does not have the Deadly Demise ability, roll one D6 for each unit within 6" of it: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

fluff.en: Devices are incorporated into some battlesuits either to prevent high-ranking pilots being taken alive for interrogation or to prevent just such fatal explosions.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** unit from your army that can **FLY** whose attacks have been resolved this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, your unit cannot declare a charge this turn.

fluff.en: Though now disgraced by association with O’Shovah, Sub-Commander Torchstar’s strike-and-fade tactics are still taught – albeit officially under other names – in many Fire caste academies.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.

effect.en: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test and you must roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 6, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: First used by O’Jir during the battle for Laguna Shard, these battlesuit-mounted emitters batter advancing foes backwards with gravitic pulse waves.

target.en: One **KROOT** unit from your army that destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

fluff.en: The psychological impact of witnessing one’s comrades being dismembered and devoured by gore-splattered Kroot cannot be overstated.

target.en: That **KROOT** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **KROOT** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge.

fluff.en: Kroot see no value in stand-up fights, caring little for honour or glory. They hit and fade, frustrating their foes and bleeding them by degrees until – weakened and out of position – they are rendered vulnerable.

target.en: One **KROOT** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: The Kroot are experts in camouflage and concealment, able to utilise cover in ways most foes would never consider and – to their great misfortune – do not anticipate.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** unit from your  army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

restrictions.en: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

fluff.en: Made famous by Commander Farsight and his protégé Brightsword, this philosophy encourages pilots to drop into the very teeth of the enemy army and apply their firepower at point-blank range.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY** unit (excluding **KROOT** units) from your army that has just shot, and one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) hit by one or more of those attacks.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

fluff.en: Rather than charge into hand-to-hand combat, T’au soldiery instead intensify their fire patterns, pinning their advancing foes and staving off their onslaught.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

fluff.en: On-board hypodermics shunt pain-blockers and chemical stimulants into the pilot’s system.

target.en: One **KROOT GRENADES** unit from your army within 8" of that enemy **VEHICLE** unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy **VEHICLE** unit is selected to shoot or fight.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, worsen the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of that enemy **VEHICLE** unit’s weapons by 1.

fluff.en: Furnished by T’au allies or returning Farstalkers, these electromagnetic grenades wreak havoc with the animuses of armoured fighting vehicles.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge, and one friendly **TRANSPORT**.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.

effect.en: Your unit embarks within that **TRANSPORT**.

restrictions.en: Every model in your **INFANTRY** unit must be within 3" of that **TRANSPORT** and there must be sufficient transport capacity to embark the entire unit.

fluff.en: Those who act as the lure in the Kauyon must be ready to make a hasty withdrawal once the enemy closes into range.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE GRENADES** unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.

when.en: Your opponent's charge phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its **charge target**.

effect.en: That enemy unit must immediately take a Battle-shock test, and until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

restrictions.en: You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Hurling a volley of photon grenades, the T’au leave their enemies dazzled and disorientated.

target.en: One **T’AU EMPIRE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: Point-defence systems trigger as incoming fire is detected, blasting projectiles from the air and lessening the power of the enemy fusillade.

target.en: That <k>Kroot/Vespid Stingwings</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit is selected to make an advance move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Kroot-/Vespid-Stachelflügel-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Vorrückenbewegung auszuführen.
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de avanzar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Kroots/Frelons Vespides amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement d’avance.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di avanzata.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング・ユニットが全力移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 크룻/베스피드 독침날개 유닛이 급속 이동 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때.
when.zh: 己方移动阶段中，在一个己方克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼单位被选择进行一次突进移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a tu unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 그 아군 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: There is much that the alien auxiliaries of the T’au empire can teach the Fire caste, not least through practical and deadly battlefield demonstrations.
fluff.de: Die Hilfstruppen des Sternenreichs der T’au können den Kriegern der Feuerkaste noch einiges beibringen – oftmals auch durch praktische und sehr tödliche Demonstration auf dem Schlachtfeld.
fluff.es: Hay mucho que los alienígenas del Imperio T'au pueden enseñar a la Casta del Fuego, sobre todo a través de demostraciones prácticas y mortales en el campo de batalla.
fluff.fr: Les auxiliaires étrangers de l’Empire T’au ont beaucoup à enseigner à la Caste du Feu, en particulier lors de démonstrations en conditions réelles.
fluff.it: Gli ausiliari alieni dell’Impero T’au hanno molto da insegnare alla Casta del Fuoco, specialmente tramite dimostrazioni sul campo, pratiche e letali.
fluff.ja: タウ・エンパイアの編入種族が火のカーストに提供できる戦術や技能は少なくない。たとえ目立たぬものであっても、それらは戦場においては多大な戦果をもたらすのだ。
fluff.ko: 불 카스트는 타우 제국의 외계 종족 보조대로부터 수많은 전술을 배운다. 물론 이 학습을 위한 최적의 배움터는 실전적이고 치명적인 전장이다.
fluff.zh: 钛帝国的异族辅助部队有许多东西可以传授给火氏军队——尤其是通过那些既实用又致命的战场实战演示。

target.en: That <k>T’au Empire</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>タウ・エンパイア</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly T’au Empire unit (excluding Kroot/Vespid Stingwings units) is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Sternenreich-der-T’au-Einheit (ausgenommen Kroot-/Vespid-Stachelflügel-Einheiten) zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Imperio T’au amiga (salvo Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid) se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de l’Empire T’au amie (unités de Kroots/Frelons Vespides exclue) est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità dell’Impero T’au amica (escluse le unità di Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata) viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方タウ・エンパイア・ユニット（クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング・ユニットを除く）が射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 타우 제국 유닛(크룻/베스피드 독침날개 유닛 제외)이 사격 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方钛帝国单位（克鲁特/胡峰尖翼单位除外）被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks that target a unit within 9" of a friendly <k>Kroot/Vespid Stingwings</k> unit have <k>[Lethal Hits]</k>.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit, die eine Einheit innerhalb von 9" um eine befreundete <k>Kroot</k>-<k>/Vespid-Stachelflügel</k>-Einheit als Ziel haben, haben <k>[Tödliche Treffer]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad a 9" o menos de alguna unidad <k>Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid</k> amiga tienen <k>[Impactos letales]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité qui ciblent une unité à 9" ou moins d’une unité de <k>Kroots/Frelons Vespides</k> amie ont <k>[Touches Fatales]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità entro 9" da un’unità di <k>Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata</k> amica hanno <k>[Colpi Letali]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃が、味方<k>クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング</k>・ユニットの9mv以内に一部でも入っているユニットを攻撃対象としている場合、<k>［会心ヒット］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 아군 <k>크룻/베스피드 독침날개</k> 유닛의 9" 내에 있는 유닛을 대상으로 한 아군 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[살상타]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位对位于己方<k>克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼</k>单位 9" 内的单位进行的远程攻击拥有<k>[致命一击]</k>。

fluff.en: Firing on coordinates provided by selfless alien auxiliaries, the T’au are able to scythe down their targets with pinpoint precision.
fluff.de: Die T’au schießen auf Koordinaten, die von selbstlosen Hilfstruppen zur Verfügung gestellt wurden, und können so ihre Ziele erbarmungslos präzise niedermähen.
fluff.es: Disparando según las coordenadas proporcionadas por altruistas auxiliares alienígenas, los T'au son capaces de aniquilar objetivos con precisión milimétrica.
fluff.fr: En faisant feu sur les coordonnées fournies par leurs altruistes auxiliaires étrangers, les T’au sont capables de faucher leurs cibles avec une précision absolue.
fluff.it: Seguendo le coordinate fornite dagli ausiliari alieni, i T’au sono in grado di falciare i bersagli con estrema precisione.
fluff.ja: 献身的な異種族編入補助部隊が提供する座標に対して射撃を行うことで、タウは恐るべき精度で標的を薙ぎ払うことができる。
fluff.ko: 헌신적인 외계 종족 보조대로부터 사격 제원을 전달받은 타우는 정밀한 화력으로 목표물을 쓸어버린다.
fluff.zh: 无私的异族辅助军战士们提供了重要的坐标，让钛星人士兵能够极其精准地歼灭目标。

target.en: That <k>Kroot/Vespid Stingwings</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit is selected to attack.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Kroot-/Vespid-Stachelflügel-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid amiga se elige para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité Kroots/Frelons Vespides amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方クルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 크룻/베스피드 독침날개 유닛이 공격을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方克鲁特/胡峰尖翼单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks have +1 AP.
effect.es: Los ataques de tu unidad tienen +1 a FP.
effect.fr: Les attaques de votre unité ont +1 en PA.
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità hanno +1 VP.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃の【貫】は+1の修正を受ける。

fluff.en: These experimental Earth caste weapon upgrades can only activate for short bursts at a time, but the extra stopping power they provide is formidable.
fluff.de: Diese experimentellen Erdkaste-Waffenverbesserungen können nur für kurze Zeitabschnitte aktiviert werden, aber ihre zusätzliche Stoppwirkung ist beträchtlich.
fluff.es: Estas mejoras experimentales de las armas de la Casta de la Tierra solo se activan durante breves periodos, pero la protección adicional que proporcionan es formidable.
fluff.fr:
Ces améliorations d’armes expérimentales de la
Caste de la Terre ne peuvent déclencher que de
courtes rafales, mais le surcroît de puissance
d’arrêt qu’elles fournissent est redoutable.
fluff.it: Queste migliorie per armi sperimentali della Casta della Terra si attivano solo per brevi istanti, ma aumentano la potenza d’impatto dell’arma in maniera formidabile.
fluff.ja: 土のカーストの試験兵器がもたらす威力の増強は一時的なものだ。だが、その威力自体は瞠目に値する。
fluff.ko: 대지 카스트의 실험적 개조가 적용된 이 무기는 장시간 지속적으로 사용할 수는 없지만, 추가적인 저지력만큼은 발군이다.
fluff.zh: 这些土氏进行的武器改造试验只能够生效短暂的时间，但拥有强大的威力。

target.en: One friendly <k>Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits</k> unit.
target.es: Una unidad <k>Equipo de Rastreadores/Exoarmaduras Sigilo</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité d’<k>Équipe de Cibleurs/Exo-armures Stealth</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>探路者小队/隐形战斗服</k>单位。

when.en: End of your Movement phase.
when.es: Al final de tu fase de movimiento.
when.fr: À la fin de votre phase de Mouvement.
when.it: Alla fine della tua fase di Movimento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.
effect.de: Wähle ein von deiner Einheit kontrolliertes Missionsziel. Jenes Missionsziel ist gesichert.
effect.es: Elige 1 objetivo que tu unidad controle. Ese objetivo está asegurado.
effect.fr: Choisissez un objectif que votre unité contrôle. Cet objectif est sécurisé.
effect.it: Scegli un obiettivo controllato dalla tua unità. Quell’obiettivo è messo in sicurezza.
effect.ja: 自軍ユニットが確保している作戦目標1個を選択する。その作戦目標は安定化する。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 장악한 목표물을 하나 지정합니다. 그 목표물은 확보 상태가 됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个您的单位控制的目标。那个目标被占领。

fluff.en: These small devices emit tightbeam triangulation signals for follow‑up waves of incoming T’au forces, silently marking out strategically vital sites to be secured.
fluff.de: Diese kleinen Geräte übertragen konzentrierte Triangulationssignale für die nächsten Wellen der T’au-Streitmacht und markieren so unauffällig strategisch wichtige Orte, die es abzusichern gilt.
fluff.es: Estos pequeños dispositivos emiten señales de triangulación para las oleadas de fuerzas T'au entrantes, marcando silenciosamente los puntos estratégicos vitales que deben ser asegurados.
fluff.fr: Ces petits dispositifs émettent des faisceaux de triangulation pour les forces t’au en approche, en signalant silencieusement les sites stratégiques à sécuriser.
fluff.it: Questi piccoli congegni emettono segnali focalizzati di triangolazione per le ondate secondarie delle forze t’au, contrassegnando silenziosamente i siti chiave da conquistare.
fluff.ja: これらの小型装置は後続のタウの諸部隊のために三角測定用のレーザー信号を発し、確保すべき戦略的要衝を静かに示し続けている。
fluff.ko: 이 작은 장치는 타우의 후발 본대가 전략적 요충지를 확보할 수 있도록 광통신 삼각측량 신호를 비밀리에 송출한다.
fluff.zh: 这些小型装置能够向前来的主力部队发射定位信号，秘密标记需要占领的战略要地。

name.ja: 超小型ドローンサポート

target.en: That <k>Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Équipe de Cibleurs/Exo-armures Stealth</k>.
target.ja: その<k>パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>探路者小队/隐形战斗服</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit starts an action.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine Späherteam-/Geist-Kampfanzug-Einheit eine Aktion auszuführen beginnt.
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Equipo de Rastreadores/Exoarmadura Sigilo amiga inicia una acción.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’Équipe de Cibleurs/Exo-armures Stealth amie entreprend une action.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Team Esploratori/Esoscheletri Stealth amica inizia un’azione.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ・ユニットがアクションを開始した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 선도반/스텔스 배틀슈트 유닛이 특수 행동을 시작할 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方探路者小队/隐形战斗服单位开始一次行动时。

effect.en: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Aktion verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Esa acción no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Cette action n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quell’azione non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは、そのアクションを行った場合でも、射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 특수 행동에도 불구하고 그 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次行动不会阻止您的单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Deployed from overflights of heavier stealth‑capable carrier drones, these tiny machines provide versatile battlefield support for T’au stealth specialists, even in the midst of vicious firefights.
fluff.de: Diese winzigen Maschinen sind von schwereren und gut getarnten Trägerdrohnen abgesetzt worden und liefern den Tarnspezialisten der T’au wertvolle Unterstützung auf dem Schlachtfeld, selbst inmitten tobender Feuergefechte.
fluff.es: Desplegados desde pesados drones transportadores con capacidad de sigilo, estas diminutas máquinas brindan un versátil apoyo en batalla a los especialistas en sigilo T'au, incluso en medio de feroces tiroteos.
fluff.fr: Déployés par aéronefs ou drones furtifs de transport, ces machines miniatures fournissent un soutien polyvalent aux unités furtives spécialisées des T’au, même en pleine fusillade.
fluff.it: Schierati dall’alto per mezzo di droni pesanti offuscati, questi piccoli congegni forniscono un versatile supporto sul campo agli specialisti della furtività t’au anche nel mezzo della mischia.
fluff.ja: これらの超小型機械は、ステルス能力を持つ大型母艦ドローンによって上空から展開され、熾烈な射撃戦の最中にあっても、タウの隠密特殊部隊に様々な戦場の支援を提供する。
fluff.ko: 이 초소형 드론은 전역 상공을 스텔스 상태로 비행하는 대형 드론으로부터 전개된다. 타우의 스텔스 특수팀은 치열한 화력전 중에도 이 소형 드론을 통해 다각도의 지원을 받는다.
fluff.zh: 通过空中的隐形运输机部署，这些小型机械能够为钛星人的隐匿专家提供多样化的战场支援，就算是在激烈的交火当中也能起到作用。

name.ja: 自動反応性カモフラージュ

target.en: That <k>Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Équipe de Cibleurs/Exo-armures Stealth</k>.
target.ja: その<k>パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>探路者小队/隐形战斗服</k>单位。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly PATHFINDER TEAM/ STEALTH BATTLESUITS unit, if that friendly unit is hidden.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete Späherteam-/Geist-Kampfanzug-Einheit als Ziel wählt und jene befreundete Einheit versteckt ist
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad EQUIPO DE RASTREADORES/EXOARMADURAS SIGILO amiga, si esa unidad amiga está oculta.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité d’Équipe de Cibleurs/Exo-armures Stealth amie, si cette dernière est cachée.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità Team Esploratori/Esoscheletri Stealth amica, se quell’unità amica è nascosta.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時、その味方ユニットが隠密状態である場合。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 은폐 상태인 아군 선도반/스텔스 배틀슈트 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方探路者小队/隐形战斗服单位选为目标时，那个己方单位处于隐藏。

effect.en: Your unit has +1 Sv.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの【防】は+1の修正を受ける。

fluff.en: An experimental new form of portable electrocamouflage generators, these small devices interweave active energy shielding with passive sensor damping to further protect T’au soldiery in hiding.
fluff.de: Diese kleinen Geräte sind eine experimentelle neue Art der Elektrotarnfelder, die aktive Energieschilde mit passiven Sensorstörvorrichtungen kombiniert, um die verborgenen T’au besser zu schützen.
fluff.es: Un nuevo prototipo de generadores de electrocamuflaje combina escudos de energía activa con amortiguación pasiva de sensores para proteger aún más a los soldados T'au ocultos.
fluff.fr: Générateurs d’électrocamouflage expérimentaux, ces appareils compacts émettent un bouclier protecteur doublé d'un brouillage passif pour accroître la protection des soldats t’au dissimulés.
fluff.it: Una nuova forma sperimentale di generatori di elettrocamuffamento portatili protegge i soldati t’au nascosti, unendo scudi di energia attivi con disturbatori di sensori passivi.
fluff.ja: これらの試験的に投入されている、携帯型電磁迷彩発生装置は、アクティブ式エネルギー遮断機能とパッシブ式センサー妨害機能を組み合わせ、隠密中のタウ兵士をさらに発見し辛くする。
fluff.ko: 이 실험적인 소형 장치는 휴대용 전자위장 발생기로, 은폐한 타우 병사를 보호하기 위해 능동형 에너지 차폐와 수동형 센서 댐핑을 결합한 것이다.
fluff.zh: 作为一种实验性的新型便携式电磁伪装发生器，这些小型装置将主动能量护盾与被动传感器抑制技术相互交织，旨在进一步为隐匿中的钛族士兵提供防护。

target.en: That <k>Battlesuit Character</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>バトルスーツ・キャラクター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Battlesuit Character unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Kampfanzug-Charaktermodell-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Personaje Exoarmadura amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Personnage en Exo-armure amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Personaggio in Esoscheletro amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方バトルスーツ・キャラクター・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 배틀슈트 캐릭터 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方战斗服角色单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
Your unit’s ranged attacks have:
  • +1 S.
  • Or: +1 S, AP and [Hazardous].
effect.de:
Die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit haben:
  • +1 S.
  • Oder: +1 S, DS und [Riskant].
effect.es:
Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen:
  • +1 a F.
  • O: +1 a F, +1 a FP, y [De riesgo].
effect.fr:
Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont :
  • +1 en F.
  • Ou : +1 en F et en PA, et [À Risque].
effect.it:
Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno:
  • +1 Fo.
  • Oppure: +1 Fo, +1 VP e [Pericolosa].
effect.ja:
そのユニットの射撃攻撃は以下を持つ：
  • 【攻】に+1の修正を受ける。
  • または：【攻】、【貫】に+1の修正を受け、［暴発］を持つ。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 위력 +1
  • 또는: 위력 및 관통 +1, [위험]
effect.zh:
您的单位的远程攻击拥有：
  • S +1。
  • 或者：S +1，AP +1，以及[危险]。

fluff.en: From hardened warheads and amplified ion capacitors, to hyperaccelerated pulse fields and refined fusion cores, the T’au are forever innovating improvements to improve the lethality of their ammunition.
fluff.de: Verstärkte Gefechtsköpfe, hochgetaktete Ionenkondensatoren, hyperbeschleunigte Pulsfelder und raffinierte Fusionskerne – die Innovationen der T’au reißen nicht ab und steigern die Tödlichkeit ihrer Munition kontinuierlich.
fluff.es: Desde obuses endurecidos y condensadores de iones amplificados hasta cmpos de inducción hiperacelerados y núcleos de fusión refinados, los T’au siempre están innovando en lo que a la letalidad de su munición se refiere.
fluff.fr: Qu’il s’agisse d’ogives renforcées, d’accumulateur à ions amplifiés, de champs impulseur hyperaccélérés ou de réacteur à fusion améliorés, les T’au innovent constamment pour accroître l’efficacité de leurs munitions.
fluff.it: Da testate rinforzate a condensatori ionici migliorati, per non parlare di campi a impulsi iperaccelerati o nuclei a fusione ottimizzati, i T’au apportano continue migliorie tese a incrementare la letalità delle loro munizioni.
fluff.ja: 強化弾頭から増幅型イオン蓄電器、超加速パルス力場や改良型フュージョンコアにいたるまで、タウは常に弾薬の威力を向上させるべく技術改良を続けている。
fluff.ko: 경화 탄두와 증폭형 이온 커패시터부터 초가속 펄스장과 정교한 융합 탄심에 이르기까지, 타우는 탄약의 치명성을 강화하기 위해 끝없는 혁신을 이어간다.
fluff.zh: 从加大弹头和强化离子电容，到极速脉冲力场和精炼融合核心，钛帝国通过不断的创新和改进来提升武器弹药的致命性。

name.ja: 拒絶粒子放出器（アップグレード）

description.en: Stealth Battlesuits unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.
description.de: Nur für eine Geist-Kampfanzug-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat -3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
description.es: Solo unidad Exoarmaduras Sigilo. Esta unidad tiene -3" al alcance de detección.
description.fr: Unité d’Exo-armures Stealth seulement. Cette unité a -3" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo unità di Esoscheletri Stealth. Questa unità ha -3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja: ステルス・バトルスーツ・ユニットのみ。このユニットの発見範囲は-3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 스텔스 배틀슈트 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限隐形战斗服单位。该单位的侦测范围减少 3"。

name.ja: 位置暴露装置（アップグレード）

description.en: Ghostkeel Battlesuit/Pathfinder Team/Stealth Battlesuits unit only. When this unit is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit has +9" detection range until this unit has shot.
description.de: Nur für eine Phantom-Kampfanzug-/Späherteam-/Geist-Kampfanzug-Einheit. Wenn diese Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird, kannst du eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 24" um diese Einheit wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +9" Entdeckungsreichweite, bis diese Einheit geschossen hat.
description.es: Solo unidad Exoarmadura Fantasmal/Equipo de Rastreadores/Exoarmaduras Sigilo. Cuando esta unidad se elija para disparar, puedes elegir 1 unidad enemiga a 24" o menos de esta unidad. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +9" al alcance de detección hasta que esta unidad haya disparado.
description.fr: Unité d’Exo-armure Ghostkeel/Équipe de Cibleurs/Exo-armures Stealth seulement. Quand cette unité est choisie pour tirer, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie à 24" ou moins d’elle. Jusqu’à ce que cette unité ait tiré, l’unité ennemie choisie a +9" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo unità di Esoscheletro Ghostkeel/Team Esploratori/Esoscheletri Stealth. Quando questa unità viene scelta per tirare, puoi selezionare un’unità nemica entro 24" da questa unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +9" alla distanza di individuazione finché questa unità non ha tirato.
description.ja: ゴーストキール・バトルスーツ/パスファインダーチーム/ステルス・バトルスーツ・ユニットのみ。このユニットが射撃を宣言した時、このユニットの24mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを1個選択できる。その射撃が終了するまで、選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+9mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 고스트킬 배틀슈트/선도반/스텔스 배틀슈트 유닛 전용. 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정되었을 때, 이 유닛의 24" 내에 있는 적 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛은 이 유닛이 사격을 종료할 때까지 발각 범위 +9"가 적용됩니다.
description.zh: 仅限鬼船战斗服/探路者小队/隐形战斗服单位。在该单位被选择进行射击时，您可以选择一个位于该单位 24" 内的敌方单位。直到该单位完成射击前，那个敌方单位的侦测范围增加 9"。

name.ja: サーモニュートロニック・プロジェクター

description.en:
Battlesuit model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s T’au Flamer weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
  • +2 S
  • +1 AP and D.
description.de:
Nur für ein Kampfanzug-Modell. Wähle im Schritt „Schlachtformation festlegen“ eine Flammenwerfer-Waffe dieses Modells. Die Attacken jener Waffe haben:
  • +2 S
  • +1 DS und SW.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Exoarmadura. En el paso de Declarar formaciones de batalla, elige 1 de las armas Lanzallamas T’au de esta miniatura. Los ataques de esa arma tienen:
  • +2 a F.
  • +1 a FP y +1 a D.
description.fr:
Figurine d’Exo-armure seulement. À l’étape Déclarer les Formations de Combat, choisissez un des lance-flammes t’au de cette figurine. Les attaques de cette arme ont :
  • +2 en F
  • +1 en PA et en D.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Esoscheletro. Nel passo Dichiarare le formazioni di battaglia scegli una delle armi lanciafiamme t’au di questo modello. Gli attacchi di quell’arma hanno:
  • +2 Fo
  • +1 VP e +1 Da.
description.ja:
バトルスーツ・兵のみ。戦闘陣形の宣言ステップ中、この兵のタウ・フレイマー武器を1個選択する。選択された武器の攻撃は：
  • 【攻】に+2の修正を受ける。
  • 【貫】と【ダ】に+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko:
배틀슈트 모델 전용. 전투 진형 선언 단계에, 이 모델의 타우 화염방사기 무기 하나를 지정합니다. 그 무기의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 위력 +2
  • 관통 및 피해 +1
description.zh:
仅限战斗服模型。在宣布战斗编队步骤中，选择该模型装备的一件钛帝国火焰喷射器。那件武器的攻击：
  • S 属性 +2。
  • AP 和 D 属性 +1。

name.ja: スーパーノヴァ・ランチャー

description.en:
Battlesuit model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s Airbursting Fragmentation Projector weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
  • +3 S
  • +1 AP and D.
description.de:
Nur für ein Kampfanzug-Modell. Wähle im Schritt „Schlachtformation festlegen“ eine der Streugranatwerfer-Waffen dieses Modells. Attacken jener Waffe haben:
  • +3 S.
  • +1 DS und SW.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Exoarmadura. En el paso de Declarar formaciones de batalla, elige 1 de las armas proyector de descarga aérea de esta miniatura. Los ataques de esa arma tienen:
  • +3 a F.
  • +1 a FP y +1 a D.
description.fr:
Figurine d’Exo-armure seulement. À l’étape Déclarer les Formations de Combat, choisissez un des Lanceurs de Charges à Dispersion de cette figurine. Les attaques de cette arme ont :
  • +3 en F
  • +1 en PA et en D.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Esoscheletro. Nel passo Dichiarare le formazioni di battaglia scegli una delle armi proiettore a frammentazione ad area di questo modello. Gli attacchi di quell’arma hanno:
  • +3 Fo
  • +1 VP e +1 Da.
description.ja:
バトルスーツ・兵のみ。戦闘陣形の宣言ステップ中、この兵のエアバースティング・フラグメンテーション・プロジェクター武器を1個選択する。選択された武器の攻撃は：
  • 【攻】に+3の修正を受ける。
  • 【貫】と【ダ】に+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko:
배틀슈트 모델 전용. 전투 진형 선언 단계에, 이 모델의 공중폭발 세열탄 투사기 무기 하나를 지정합니다. 그 무기의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 위력 +3
  • 관통 및 피해 +1
description.zh:
仅限战斗服模型。在宣布战斗编队步骤中，选择该模型装备的一件空爆破片发射器。那件武器的攻击：
  • S 属性 +3
  • AP 和 D 属性 +1。

description.en: Kroot Shaper model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three friendly Kroot Carnivores/Farstalkers units. Those units have Deep Strike.
description.de: Nur für ein Kroot-Former-Modell. Im Schritt „Schlachtformation festlegen“ kannst du bis zu drei befreundete Kroot-Jagdtrupp-/Fern­pirscher-Einheiten wählen. Jene Einheiten haben Schocktruppen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Metamorfo Kroot. En el paso de Declarar formaciones de batalla, puedes elegir hasta 3 unidades Carnívoros Kroot/Acechantes amigas. Esas unidades tienen Despliegue rápido.
description.fr: Figurine de Mentor Kroot seulement. À l’étape Déclarer les Formations de Combat, vous pouvez choisir trois unités de Carnivores Kroots/Exorôdeurs amies maximum. Ces unités ont Frappe en Profondeur.
description.it: Solo modelli di Kroot Plasmatore. Nel passo Dichiarare le formazioni di battaglia puoi scegliere fino a tre unità di Kroot Carnivori/Kroot della Lunga Caccia amiche. Quelle unità hanno Attacco in Profondità.
description.ja: クルート・シェイパー・兵のみ。戦闘陣形の宣言ステップ中、自軍は味方クルート・カーニヴォア/ファーストーカー・ユニットを最大3個まで選択できる。選択されたユニットは『縦深攻撃』を持つ。
description.ko: 크룻 구체자 모델 전용. 전투 진형 선언 단계에, 아군 크룻 고기포식자/먼길밟이 유닛을 최대 3개 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 유닛에 심층 타격이 부여됩니다.
description.zh: 仅限克鲁特塑形者模型。在宣布战斗编队步骤中，您可以选择最多三个己方克鲁特捕食者/远猎者单位。被选择的单位拥有深入打击技能。

description.en: T’au Empire model only (excluding Kroot models). In your Command phase, you can select one Kroot/Vespid Stingwings unit within 12" of this model. If you do, that unit has +1 Ld and OC until the start of your next Command phase.
description.de: Nur für ein Sternenreich-der-T’au-Modell (ausgenommen Kroot-Modelle). In deiner Befehlsphase kannst du eine Kroot-/Vespid-Stachelflügel-Einheit innerhalb von 12" um dieses Modell wählen. Wenn du dies tust, hat jene Einheit bis zum Beginn deiner nächsten Befehls­phase +1 MW und MK.
description.es: Solo miniatura Imperio T’au (salvo Kroot). En tu fase de mando, puedes elegir 1 unidad Kroot/Aguijones Alados Véspid a 12" o menos de esta miniatura. Si lo haces, esa unidad tiene +1 a L y +1 a CO hasta el inicio de tu siguiente fase de mando.
description.fr: Figurine de l’Empire T’au seulement (figurines de Kroot exclues). À votre phase de Commandement, vous pouvez choisir une unité de Kroots/Frelons Vespides à 12" ou moins de cette figurine. Dans ce cas, l’unité choisie a +1 en Cd et en CO jusqu’au début de votre prochaine phase de Commandement.
description.it: Solo modelli dell’Impero T’au (esclusi modelli di Kroot). Nella tua fase di comando puoi scegliere un’unità di Kroot/Vespid Alacuminata entro 12" da questo modello. Se lo fai, quell’unità ha +1 D e CO fino all’inizio della tua prossima fase di comando.
description.ja: タウ・エンパイア・兵のみ。（クルート・兵を除く）。自軍側指揮フェイズ中、自軍はこの兵の12mv以内に一部でも入っているクルート/ヴェスピッド・スティングウィング・ユニットを1個選択してもよい。選択した場合、次の自軍側指揮フェイズ開始時まで、そのユニットの【統】と【確】は+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 타우 제국 모델 전용(크룻 모델 제외). 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈에, 이 모델의 12" 내에 있는 크룻/베스피드 독침날개 유닛 하나를 지정할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 플레이어의 다음 지휘 페이즈가 시작될 때까지 그 유닛에 통솔 및 장악 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限钛帝国模型（克鲁特 模型除外）。在己方指挥阶段中，您可以选择位于该模型 12" 内的一个克鲁特/胡蜂尖翼单位。若这么做，那么直到下一个己方指挥阶段开始前，那个单位的 Ld 和 OC 属性 +1。

name.ja: プラズマアクセラレイター・ライフル

description.en:
Battlesuit model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model’s Plasma Rifle weapons. That weapon’s attacks have:
  • +2 S
  • +1 A, AP and D.
description.de:
Nur für ein Kampfanzug-Modell. Wähle im Schritt „Schlachtformation festlegen“ eine der Plasmagewehr-Waffen dieses Modells. Attacken jener Waffe haben:
  • +2 S
  • +1 A, DS und SW.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Exoarmadura. En el paso de Declarar formaciones de batalla, elige 1 de las armas fusil de plasma de esta miniatura. Los ataques de esa arma tienen:
  • +2 a F.
  • +1 a A, +1 a FP, y +1 a D.
description.fr:
Figurine d’Exo-armure seulement. À l’étape Déclarer les Formations de Combat, choisissez un des Fusils à Plasma Froid de cette figurine. Les attaques de l’arme choisie ont :
  • +2 en F
  • +1 en A, en PA et en D.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Esoscheletro. Nel passo Dichiarare le formazioni di battaglia scegli una delle armi fucile lungo plasma di questo modello. Gli attacchi di quell’arma hanno:
  • +2 Fo
  • +1 A, +1 VP e +1 Da.
description.ja:
バトルスーツ・兵のみ。戦闘陣形の宣言ステップ中、この兵のプラズマライフル武器を1個選択する。選択された武器の攻撃は：
  • 【攻】に+2の修正を受ける。
  • 【数】と【貫】と【ダ】に+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko:
배틀슈트 모델 전용. 전투 진형 선언 단계에, 이 모델의 플라스마 소총 무기 하나를 지정합니다. 그 무기의 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 위력 +2
  • 공격, 관통, 피해 +1
description.zh:
仅限战斗服模型。在宣布战斗编队步骤中，选择该模型装备的一件等离子步枪。那件武器的攻击：
  • S 属性 +2。
  • A、AP和D 属性 +1。

description.en: **T’AU EMPIRE** model only (excluding **KROOT SHAPER** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of from the third.
**T’AU EMPIRE** model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

**T’AU EMPIRE** model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three **T’AU EMPIRE** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

**T’AU EMPIRE** model only (excluding **KROOT SHAPER** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.
**T’AU EMPIRE** model only (excluding **KROOT SHAPER** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

**T’AU EMPIRE** model only. In the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step, you can select up to two friendly **T'AU EMPIRE** units within 6" of this model that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the **Scouts 6"** ability.

**T’AU EMPIRE** model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly **T’AU EMPIRE** model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model’s Objective Control characteristic.

**T’AU EMPIRE** model only (excluding **KROOT SHAPER** models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability while targeting their Spotted unit.
**T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

**T’au EMPIRE BATTLESUIT** model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

A single Trail Shaper can alter the entire character of a war in the favour of the T’au Empire.

fluff.en: Juvenile Krootox exhibit greater aggression and agility than their elders. Bands of Kroot make use of these facets by riding the Krootox into battle in Rampager packs. They act as ambushers, terror troops and skirmish cavalry, striking fast at their foes from unexpected quarters and seeking to break their battle lines to leave them vulnerable to the rest of the Hunting Pack.

description.en: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly **KROOT INFANTRY** unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** repeater cannon; close combat weapon; Krootox fists.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each have their repeater cannon replaced with 1 tanglecannon.

fluff.en: Krootox make excellent living gun platforms, lumbering into battle with cannons strapped to their backs, their Kroot gunners swaying atop their steeds in primitive harnesses. Though not in themselves aggressive, Krootox view the Kroot Carnivores they fight alongside as packmates, and will employ their great strength to defend their kin.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this **TRANSPORT** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.
While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 2 heavy rail cannons; 6 ion cannons; 2 long-barrelled burst cannon arrays; 2 missile pods; 10 seeker missiles; armoured hull.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: The Manta is an advanced, super-heavy dropship used to deliver large contingents of troops into combat. Powerful energy fields shield the craft during descent, while no less than sixteen drone-controlled burst cannons fend off hostile attention and wing-mounted primary guns engage priority targets that might jeopardise the Manta’s landing site.

transport.en:
This model has a transport capacity of all of the following:

■ 200 **T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY** or **TACTICAL DRONE** models
■ 4 **DEVILFISH**, **SKY RAY GUNSHIP** or **HAMMERHEAD** models
■ 8 **BATTLESUIT** models with a Wounds characteristic of 9 or less

Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.
The bearer is equipped with 1 drone burst cannon and the bearer’s unit has the Infiltrators ability.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** pulse carbine; pulse pistol; close combat weapon.

wargear.en: 1 model in this unit equipped with a pulse carbine can be equipped with 1 semi-automatic grenade launcher. That model’s pulse carbine cannot be replaced.
Up to 3 Pathfinders can each have their pulse carbine replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 ion rifle ◦ 1 rail rifle
The Pathfinder Shas’ui can be equipped with up to two of the following, and can take duplicates: ◦ 1 gun drone ◦ 1 marker drone ◦ 1 shield drone

fluff.en: Pathfinder Teams wreak havoc behind enemy lines. Their firepower is formidable, especially when sniping with potent rail rifles, and their drones can optimise the team’s pulse fire or drive the enemy back with gravitic waves. Yet their deadliest ability is painting priority targets with massed markerlights for heavier T’au units to annihilate.

description.en: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

loadout.en: **Every model is equipped with:** Piranha burst cannon; 2 twin pulse carbines; armoured hull.

wargear.en: Any number of models can each be equipped with up to 2 seeker missiles.
Any number of models can each have their Piranha burst cannon can be replaced with 1 Piranha fusion blaster.

fluff.en: Streaking ahead of the main T’au forces, squadrons of these light combat skimmers rake targets of opportunity with salvoes of heavy firepower. They can further detach entire squadrons of drones to sow mayhem behind enemy lines before they redock, increasing the havoc the Piranhas can cause or covering their swift retreat.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot **FLY**, add 1 to the Hit roll.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** accelerator burst cannon; quad ion turret; 2 seeker missiles; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model’s accelerator burst cannon can be replaced with 1 missile pod.

fluff.en: The Razorshark is an air superiority fighter with enough resilience and potent firepower to double as an alarmingly effective ground-attack craft at need. Deployed in large numbers to win control of the skies ahead of major T’au offensives, Razorsharks fill the air with hails of searing ion blasts and streaking seeker missiles.

description.en: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by this model. Until the end of the phase, that weapon has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** heavy burst cannon; twin plasma rifle; Riptide fists.

wargear.en: This model can be equipped with up to 2 missile drones.
This model’s twin plasma rifles can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 twin fusion blaster ◦ 1 twin smart missile system
This model’s heavy burst cannon can be replaced with 1 ion accelerator.

fluff.en: The Riptide combines the armoured resilience and overwhelming firepower of a heavy battle tank with the agility of a swift and skilful warrior. Powered by a thrumming nova reactor, the battlesuit can overcharge its systems at need, while its massed firepower can eradicate entire formations of enemy warriors or armoured vehicles.

description.en: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can **FLY**, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** 1 seeker missile rack; 2 twin pulse carbines; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model’s 2 twin pulse carbines can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 2 accelerator burst cannons ◦ 2 smart missile systems

fluff.en: This unusual hover tank relies upon other T’au units to use markerlights to highlight targets for its seeker missiles. Once this is done, the Sky Ray’s salvoes are nigh inescapable. An especially effective anti-aircraft asset, it employs advanced velocity trackers to predict enemy flight paths and destroy them with hurtling warheads.

description.en: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and more than 8" away from all enemy units.
The bearer’s unit has the **MARKERLIGHT** keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.
The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:

The Stealth Shas’vre can be equipped with 1 pulse pistol.
The Stealth Shas’vre can be equipped with 1 marker drone.
The Stealth Shas’vre can be equipped with 1 gun drone.

fluff.en: Benefiting from sensor-baffling stealth technology, jet-assisted speed and impressive firepower, Stealth Battlesuit teams make excellent forward operatives who can deploy homing beacons to guide entire insertion forces into battle from low orbit.

description.en: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.
Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a **TITANIC** or **TOWERING** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** cluster rocket system; destroyer missiles; pulse driver cannon; 2 twin smart missile system; twin T’au flamer; thunderous footfalls.

wargear.en: This model’s twin T’au flamer can be replaced with one of the following: ◦ 1 twin airbursting fragmentation projector ◦ 1 twin burst cannon
This model’s pulse driver cannon can be replaced with 1 pulse blast cannon.

fluff.en: These vast ballistic suits are ponderous by T’au standards, borne into battle beneath Manta Gunships. Yet even a single such walking gun-tower is equal to the mightiest fortress, anchoring the T’au lines while their crews unleash apocalyptic firestorms with the potential to eradicate entire armies of foes.

description.en: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy **INFANTRY** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

***Designer’s Note**: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.*
The bearer’s unit has the **MARKERLIGHT** keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.
Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

wargear.en: Any number of Fire Warrior models can each have their pulse rifle replaced with 1 pulse carbine.

The Fire Warrior Shas’ui can be equipped with up to two of the following, and can take duplicates: ◦ 1 guardian drone (it cannot take duplicates of this piece of wargear) ◦ 1 gun drone ◦ 1 marker drone ◦ 1 shield drone

fluff.en: Fire Warrior Strike Teams are the mainstay of many Hunter Cadres, unleashing storms of potent anti-personnel firepower that few foes can long endure. Tough, dependable, numerous and with access to a variety of specialised weaponry and drone support, these Fire Warriors will hold the line no matter what odds they face.

description.en: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, select one visible enemy unit (excluding Lone Operative units) within 24" of this unit, and roll six D6 for that unit: For each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** missile pod; 2 seeker missiles; 2 twin ion rifles; armoured hull.

wargear.en: This model’s missile pod can be replaced with 1 twin missile pod.

fluff.en: Able to micro-manufacture its own energy-munitions in the heat of battle, the Sun Shark drops thrumming pulse bombs onto the foe and obliterates them in ferocious blasts of unleashed power. Boasting sufficient support weaponry to fight off enemy attempts at aerial interdiction, formations of these aircraft form mobile airborne fortresses in the heat of battle.

description.en: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

This model’s fusion eradicator can be replaced with 1 tri-axis ion cannon.
This model’s tri-axis ion cannon can be replaced with 1 fusion eradicator.

fluff.en: Ta’unar Supremacy Armour is the largest class of T’au battlesuit yet encountered. Principally designed for static defence, the KX139 platform lacks manoeuvrability, but supports a broad suite of immensely powerful weapons that can hold their own against targets ranging from Imperial Knights to towering alien monstrosities.

description.en: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

At the start of your opponent’s Charge phase, you can select one visible enemy unit (excluding **MONSTER** and **VEHICLE** units) within 12" of this unit. That unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the turn, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that unit.
At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can either make a Normal move of up to 6" or a Fall Back move.
The bearer is equipped with 1 twin pulse blaster.

loadout.en:
**Ri’Lantar is equipped with:** 1 fusion eliminator; 1 XV pulse pistol; 1 shardstorm burst system; 1 MV15 gun drone.
**Ri’Locai is equipped with**: 1 ion scattercannon; 1 XV pulse pistol; 1 shardstorm burst system; 1 MV15 gun drone.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Shas’ri Locai and Shas’ri Lantar fight with an aggression rarely seen amongst the Fire caste. There is a focus to their ferocity, however, leaping close to their foes in jet-assisted bounds and unleashing punishing firepower before discharging kinetic shock waves built up by their neocapacitor shields and retreating again amidst the resultant carnage.

description.en: Each time this **FORTIFICATION** is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this **FORTIFICATION**.

While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more **FORTIFICATIONS** from your army:

■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **FORTIFICATION**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

loadout.en: **This model is equipped with:** drone defenders.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Like a harbour amidst a raging storm, Tidewall Droneports house swarms of tactical drones and shield them from the enemy’s fire. At a command from the droneport operators, these drones are unleashed to join the battle. Meanwhile, the droneports themselves are able to hover and relocate upon the shifting tides of war.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 11 **T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **BATTLESUIT**, **KROOT** or **VESPID STINGWINGS** models.

fluff.en: These mobile anti-grav gun turrets mount railguns whose hypersonic rounds can stop even super-heavy war engines dead in their tracks. They form deadly fire points around which Tidewall Shieldlines and droneports are arrayed into full defence networks – floating fortresses that can reposition at need to funnel and slaughter the foe.

fluff.en: In keeping with the Code of Fire, the Tidewall Shieldline provides a mobile fortification that can redeploy during battle. Its refractive field absorbs enemy fire, while its design allows entrenched Fire Warriors to ride the shieldline to a new position when it moves.

transport.en: This model has a transport capacity of 11 **T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY** models. It cannot transport **BATTLESUIT**, **KROOT** or **VESPID STINGWINGS** models. If this model is equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, it has a transport capacity of 22 **T’AU INFANTRY** models instead.

fluff.en: Tiger Sharks are large fighter-bombers employed to knock out key enemy assets with a range of sophisticated weaponry. Whether deploying a shower of remote weapons platforms or strafing ground targets with its ion cannons and wing-mounted missile pods, the aircraft’s silhouette has been the last sight of countless victims.

description.en: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

loadout.en: **Each model is equipped with:** neutron blaster; Stingwing claws.

wargear.en: If this unit contains 10 models:  ◦ The Vespid Strain Leader can be equipped with 1 Oversight Drone.  ◦ 1 Vespid Stingwing can replace its neutron blaster with 1 T’au flamer.  ◦ 1 Vespid Stingwing can replace its neutron blaster with 1 neutron grenade launcher.  ◦ 1 Vespid Stingwing can replace its neutron blaster with 1 neutron rail rifle.

fluff.en: These alien auxiliaries thrum into battle on membranous wings, their airborne agility leaving the enemy nowhere to hide. Resilient enough to shrug off all but the heaviest incoming fire, they unleash punishing radioactive salvoes from their neutron blasters that soon reduce their targets to little more than glowing craters.
